# Kernel — Browsers-as-a-Service API for Web Agents (formerly OnKernel)

For the complete self-contained reference (setup + all examples + API reference + gotchas in one file):
https://www.kernel.sh/.well-known/skills/kernel/SKILL.md

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install @onkernel/sdk playwright-core
export KERNEL_API_KEY=your-key    # get at dashboard.onkernel.com
```

```typescript
import Kernel from "@onkernel/sdk";
import { chromium } from "playwright-core";

const kernel = new Kernel();
const kb = await kernel.browsers.create({ timeout_seconds: 300 });

// CDP proxy may need a moment — retry
let browser;
for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
  try { browser = await chromium.connectOverCDP(kb.cdp_ws_url); break; }
  catch (e) { if (i === 2) throw e; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); }
}

const page = browser.contexts()[0].pages()[0];
await page.goto("https://example.com");
console.log(await page.title());
await browser.close();
```

## API Methods

- `new Kernel({ apiKey? })` → constructor (falls back to KERNEL_API_KEY env var)
- `kernel.browsers.create({ timeout_seconds?, stealth? })` → returns `{ cdp_ws_url, session_id }`
- `kernel.app(name).action<PayloadType>(name, fn)` → typed serverless action
- CLI: `kernel login`, `kernel create`, `kernel deploy <file>`, `kernel invoke <app> <fn>`

## Key Gotchas

- Package: `@onkernel/sdk` (Node.js) / `kernel` (Python) — DIFFERENT names
- CLI: `brew install onkernel/tap/kernel`
- Env var: `KERNEL_API_KEY`
- Timeout: `timeout_seconds` NOT `timeout` — `timeout` is silently ignored
- Use `connectOverCDP()` NOT `connect()` — Kernel exposes CDP endpoint
- Use `playwright-core` NOT `playwright` for deployed apps (full package breaks bundler)
- CDP proxy not ready immediately after `create()` — retry connection with 2s delay
- `page.evaluate`: use string literals in deployed apps (`'document.title'`), not arrow functions — bundler `__name` helper breaks them
- `app.action<PayloadType>()` generic is required for typed payload — without it payload is `unknown`
- Dashboard: dashboard.onkernel.com

## Doc Pages

- /docs/quickstart — install, auth, first browser
- /docs/browsers — session config, CDP retry, timeouts
- /docs/apps — deploy as serverless, CLI workflow
- /docs/api-reference — full SDK reference
- /docs/troubleshooting — error catalog
